name: Twitch
title: The Plague Rat
shortBio:
- Deliberating Poison (W) is an AoE spell around him
- Ambush (Q) can last up to 50 seconds
- Expunge (E) removes poison stacks on enemies

skins.name: Medieval Twitch
skins.description: An assassin-for-hire living beneath Dread Fortress Zaun, Twitch is a disgusting malefactor who has tipped every one of his killing implements in moist, toxic garbage. He excitedly awaits each contract, eager to kill, steal, and destroy as much as he can.

skins.name: Crime City Twitch
skins.description: Deeply violent and severely paranoid, Twitch runs one of the largest crime syndicates in the nation. His orders are carried out by a literal army of rat-men, the only creatures he even comes close to trusting.

skins.name: Twitch Shadowfoot

chromas.name: Twitch Shadowfoot (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

skins.description: An extremely aggravating presence both in-game and at the table, Twitch Shadowfoot is the adorable Rift Quest counterpart to the actual Twitch, who is insane. Unsurprisingly, the cuddly rat-man rogue spends nearly every turn stealing his companions' equipment, mumbling of a vast conspiracy to overthrow him from his 'toilet kingdom'.

skins.name: Dragonslayer Twitch

chromas.name: Dragonslayer Twitch (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

skins.description: A lesser dragon who has learned to blend in among humans… poorly. Twitch worships the true dragons and plans to one day become one himself, though he isn't sure how just yet.

skins.name: High Noon Twitch

chromas.name: High Noon Twitch (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.name: High Noon Twitch (Nomad)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the MSI 2022 High Noon event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the MSI 2022 High Noon event.

skins.description: It starts like this: An ill wind blows across the desert, dessicated rats turn up in the streets, rotting under the hot sun. Then the traveling undertaker arrives. No one knows who (or what) he is, nor where he hails from… But it seems even Death has a bone to pick with the King of the Sulfur Rail. Another Harbinger arrives.

passive.name: Deadly Venom
passive.description: Twitch's basic attacks infect the target, dealing magic damage each second.

spells.name: Ambush
spells.description: Twitch turns Invisible for several seconds, gaining Move Speed. He then gains Attack Speed after coming out of Invisibility.
spells.dynamicDescription:
After @MaxFadeTime@ seconds of not taking damage or after @MaxDelayTime@ seconds, Twitch turns Invisible for @StealthDuration@ seconds, gaining @MoveSpeedMod*100@% Move Speed.

Twitch gains @AttackSpeedMod*100@% Attack Speed for @AttackSpeedDuration@ seconds after coming out of Invisibility.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Venom Cask
spells.description: Twitch hurls a cask of venom that explodes, inflicting Deadly Venom and slowing enemies in the area.
spells.dynamicDescription: Twitch hurls an exploding cask of venom, inflicting @StacksAdded@ stacks of <keywordMajor>Deadly Venom</keywordMajor> and <status>Slowing</status> enemies by @BaseSlowAmount@% for @Duration@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Expunge
spells.description: All nearby enemies secrete Twitch's toxic venoms from their bodies, dealing damage for each stack.
spells.dynamicDescription: Twitch deals <physicalDamage>@BaseDamage@ physical damage</physicalDamage> plus <physicalDamage>@TotalStackDamage@</physicalDamage> per stack of <keywordMajor>Deadly Venom</keywordMajor> to all marked nearby enemies.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Spray and Pray
spells.description: Twitch closes his eyes and fires his crossbow, rapidly spraying powerful piercing bolts ahead of him.
spells.dynamicDescription: For @Duration@ seconds Twitch gains @BonusRange@ Attack Range, <physicalDamage>@BonusAD@ Attack Damage</physicalDamage> and his basic attacks become piercing bolts that deal @FallOffDamage*100@% less damage to subsequent targets down to a minimum of @MinimumFallOffDamage*100@%.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
